global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes including an oval and a rectangle, rendered in a light gray color.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: An overlaying rectangle shape that is slightly darker than the background, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A smaller circular shape in the background, adding visual interest to the composition.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A thin vertical line that adds a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Secure & simple Built for peace of mind', prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A smaller button-like text saying 'Order now', positioned just above the bottom edge.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'EarnPath' displayed in a simple, modern font at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with abstract shapes, Secure & simple, Order now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Secure & simple, Built for peace of mind, Order now
